metadata.website_type: local church information and services website

tasks.name: Plan a Sunday visit with a 9–11am service that has a children’s program for ages 5–10
tasks.description: Find a Sunday worship service that starts between 9:00 and 11:00 am and offers a children’s program for ages 5–10, then add both the main service and the matching children’s program to a visit plan.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Plan a Visit” option in the main navigation menu.
On the Visit page, locate the “Service Times” section and click the filter button or link.
In the “Day of Week” filter, select “Sunday” from the options.
In the time range filter, set the earliest start time to 9:00am and the latest start time to 11:00am.
In the “Families & Children” or similar filter group, check the box labeled “Children’s program for ages 5–10.”
Click the “Apply Filters” button to update the list of available services.
From the filtered list, click on the first service card that shows a Sunday service starting between 9:00 and 11:00am with children’s programming indicated.

On the selected service details page, click the “Add to Visit Plan” button, then in the children’s program section select the option for ages 5–10 and click the “Add Children’s Program” or equivalent button.

tasks.name: Register for the earliest free weekday class starting after 5:00pm this month
tasks.description: Find a free class or workshop held on a weekday this month that starts after 5:00pm, choose the earliest available date, and complete the registration form for 2 attendees.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Events” or “Calendar” item in the main navigation to open the events listing.
On the events page, open the category filter and select “Classes & Workshops.”
Open the date range filter and set it to show only events occurring within the current month.
Open the “Day of Week” filter and select Monday through Friday, leaving Saturday and Sunday unchecked.
Open the time filter and set it to show events with a start time of 5:00pm or later.
Click the “Apply Filters” button and then use the sort dropdown to select “Date – Earliest First.”
From the sorted results, click on the first event that is labeled as free (price $0) and matches the filters, then click the “Register” or “Sign Up” button on its details page.

On the registration form, enter a sample first and last name (e.g., “Alex Taylor”), use “alex.taylor@example.com” for the email field, set the number of attendees to 2, and click the final “Submit Registration” or equivalent button.

tasks.name: Request a room reservation for 8–12 people on an upcoming Wednesday from 7–9pm
tasks.description: Find an available room with capacity between 8 and 12 people for the next Wednesday evening from 7:00pm to 9:00pm and submit a reservation request for a small group meeting.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Facility Use” or “Room Reservations” link in the main navigation or footer.
On the room reservations page, open the date picker and select the next upcoming Wednesday on the calendar.
In the time slot or time range selector, set the desired start time to 7:00pm and end time to 9:00pm.
In the “Group Size” or “Capacity Needed” field, enter 10 as the expected number of attendees so that rooms suitable for 8–12 people are shown.
Click the “Search Available Rooms” or similar button to display rooms that match the date, time, and capacity criteria.

From the list of available rooms, select a room whose listed capacity range includes 8–12 people (for example, a room labeled for 10–15 people) by clicking its “Request This Room” or equivalent button.

On the reservation request form, enter a group name such as “Midweek Bible Study,” type “John Rivera” as the contact name, use “john.rivera@example.com” as the email, confirm the selected date and 7:00–9:00pm time slot in the appropriate fields if required, and click the “Submit Reservation Request” button.

tasks.name: Save 3 recent sermons about forgiveness to a watch-later playlist
tasks.description: Search for sermons on the topic of forgiveness from the last 6 months, sort them by newest first, and add the 3 most recent sermons to a watch-later playlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Sermons” or “Messages” link in the main navigation.
On the sermons page, click the search bar and type “forgiveness,” then press Enter or click the search icon.
Open the date filter and choose the option labeled “Last 6 Months” or manually set a range that covers the last 6 months.
Open the topic or tags filter and check the box for “Forgiveness” if it is available, then click “Apply Filters.”
Use the sort dropdown to select “Date – Newest First” so that the most recent sermons appear at the top.
In the filtered and sorted list, click the “Add to Watch Later” or similar button on the first three sermon cards in order from top to bottom.
After adding those three sermons, click the “Watch Later” or “Playlist” link in the page header or sidebar to open the playlist that now includes the 3 selected forgiveness sermons.

tasks.name: Sign up for a Saturday volunteer role requiring less than 3 hours per week
tasks.description: Find a volunteer opportunity that takes place on Saturdays and lists a weekly time commitment under 3 hours, choose the first qualifying role, and submit a volunteer interest form for that role.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Serve” or “Volunteer” option in the main navigation.
On the volunteer opportunities page, open the “Day” filter and select “Saturday.”
Open the “Time Commitment” or “Hours per Week” filter and choose the option that indicates “Under 3 hours” or manually set a maximum of 3 hours.
If there is a category filter, select a general category such as “Guest Services” or leave it on “All” if no preference is required, then click “Apply Filters.”
Use any sorting control to select “Name – A to Z” or “Recommended” and then identify the first role listed that matches the Saturday and <3 hours/week filters.
Click on that role’s title to open its details page, then click the “Sign Up” or “I’m Interested” button.

On the interest form, enter a name such as “Maria Lopez,” provide “maria.lopez@example.com” as the email, select “Saturday” from any preferred day dropdown, choose a preferred time window that fits within the listed schedule (for example, “8:00–10:00am”), and click the “Submit Interest” or equivalent button.

tasks.name: Submit a $25 one-time pledge to the Youth Ministry fund
tasks.description: Use the giving page to create a one-time pledge of exactly $25 designated to the Youth Ministry fund, choosing a pledge (no immediate payment) option and completing the pledge form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Give” or “Online Giving” link in the main navigation or header.
On the giving page, select the “Pledge Only” or “Commitment (no payment yet)” option if presented with giving types.
In the amount field, type “25” to set the pledge amount to $25.
Open the fund or designation dropdown and select “Youth Ministry” from the list of available funds.
Open the frequency options and select “One-Time” as the pledge frequency.
In the name fields, enter “Daniel Kim” as the donor name and use “daniel.kim@example.com” as the email address.
Scroll to the bottom of the form and click the “Submit Pledge” or “Confirm Commitment” button to finalize the $25 one-time pledge to Youth Ministry.

tasks.name: Add 2 non-overlapping community events in the same week to a personal events list
tasks.description: Find two community events occurring in the same week (Monday–Sunday) whose times do not overlap and add both to a personal “My Events” or favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Events” or “Calendar” option in the main navigation.
On the events page, open the category filter and select “Community” or “Community Events.”
Switch the calendar view to “Week” view so that events for a single Monday–Sunday period are shown together.

From the visible week, choose one event that starts in the afternoon (for example, between 12:00pm and 5:00pm) by clicking on its event card and then clicking an “Add to My Events” or “Save” button on the event details page.

Return to the weekly calendar view and choose a second community event in the same Monday–Sunday week whose start time is at least 1 hour after the end time of the first event, then click its event card.
On the second event’s details page, click the “Add to My Events” or “Save” button to add it to the personal events list.
Click the “My Events,” “Saved Events,” or similar link in the header or account area to open the list that now contains the two selected community events from the same week.

tasks.name: Request a morning pastoral counseling appointment next week with a pastor specializing in marriage
tasks.description: Find a pastor whose profile mentions marriage counseling, select an available counseling slot next week between 9:00am and 12:00pm, and submit an appointment request form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Care & Counseling” or “Pastoral Care” link in the main navigation.
On the care page, click the “Meet the Pastors” or “Counseling Team” section to view pastor profiles.
Scan the list and click on the first pastor whose profile includes “marriage counseling” or “marriage and family” in their listed specialties.
On that pastor’s profile page, click the “Request Counseling Appointment” or similar button to open the scheduling interface.
In the date selector, choose any date that falls in the next calendar week (Monday–Sunday of next week).
In the time selector, choose an available appointment slot that begins between 9:00am and 12:00pm on the selected date.

On the appointment request form, enter a name such as “Samantha Green,” use “samantha.green@example.com” as the email, select “Marriage” or “Marriage Counseling” as the reason for visit from any dropdown, and click the “Submit Request” button.

entities.name: WorshipService
entities.description: A scheduled worship service that visitors can attend and plan around.

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g., '9:00am Contemporary Service'

fields.name: startDateTime
fields.description: Exact start date and time of the service

fields.name: endDateTime
fields.description: Exact end date and time of the service

fields.name: serviceLocation
fields.description: Name/description of where the service meets (e.g., 'Main Sanctuary')

fields.name: hasChildrenProgram
fields.description: Quick flag to support filtering for services with any children’s programming

fields.name: teachingPastorId
fields.description: References the Pastor primarily teaching this service

fields.name: ministryId
fields.description: Optional reference to a Ministry (e.g., Worship Ministry)

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Whether this service is currently offered

entities.name: ChildrensProgram
entities.description: An age-specific children’s program associated with a worship service.

fields.name: serviceId
fields.description: Associated WorshipService.id

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g., 'Kids Church (Ages 5–10)'

fields.name: checkinStartTime
fields.description: Time of day for check-in, e.g., '08:45'

fields.name: programStartDateTime
fields.description: Exact start datetime; typically aligned with or slightly after the service start

fields.name: programEndDateTime
fields.description: Exact end datetime; typically aligned with the service end

fields.name: location
fields.description: Room or area where the children’s program meets

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Maximum number of children

entities.name: VisitPlan
entities.description: Planned visit information including selected service and children’s program(s).

fields.name: serviceId
fields.description: Selected worship service

fields.name: childrenProgramIds
fields.description: Array of ChildrensProgram.id values added to the visit

entities.name: Event
entities.description: A scheduled event such as a class, workshop, or community activity.

fields.name: price
fields.description: Cost per registration; 0 for free events

fields.name: isFree
fields.description: Convenience flag; true if price == 0

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Maximum attendees

fields.name: remainingCapacity
fields.description: Remaining spots available

fields.name: ministryId
fields.description: Optional associated Ministry

entities.name: EventRegistration
entities.description: Registration record for an event, including attendee count.

fields.name: attendeeCount
fields.description: Number of attendees under this registration

entities.name: SavedEventList
entities.description: Personal list of saved/registered events (My Events).

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g., 'My Events'

fields.name: eventIds
fields.description: Array of Event.id that are saved to this list

entities.name: EventViewState
entities.description: UI state for the Events & Calendar page (current view and filters).

fields.name: currentStartDate
fields.description: Start of currently viewed date range (month/week)

fields.name: currentEndDate
fields.description: End of currently viewed date range (month/week)

fields.name: selectedCategory
fields.description: Currently selected category filter label, e.g., 'Community Events'

fields.name: selectedDaysOfWeek
fields.description: Array of selected days for filters (values from day-of-week enum fields)

fields.name: timeFilterStart
fields.description: Time-of-day filter start, e.g., '17:00'

fields.name: timeFilterEnd
fields.description: Time-of-day filter end

entities.name: Room
entities.description: A reservable room or space in the church facilities.

fields.name: capacityMin
fields.description: Minimum recommended group size

fields.name: capacityMax
fields.description: Maximum capacity

fields.name: amenities
fields.description: List of amenity labels, e.g., ['projector', 'whiteboard']

entities.name: RoomReservationRequest
entities.description: A request to reserve a specific room for a meeting or event.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date of the reservation (date portion used)

entities.name: Sermon
entities.description: A recorded sermon/message available in the sermon library.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date the sermon was preached

fields.name: speakerName
fields.description: Name of the speaker as displayed

fields.name: pastorId
fields.description: Optional reference to Pastor entity

fields.name: topics
fields.description: Free-form topic/tag strings, e.g., ['forgiveness', 'grace']

entities.name: WatchLaterPlaylist
entities.description: User’s watch-later list of saved sermons.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Playlist name, e.g., 'Watch Later'

fields.name: sermonIds
fields.description: Array of Sermon.id added to the playlist

entities.name: VolunteerRole
entities.description: A volunteer opportunity/role that people can sign up for.

fields.name: daysNeeded
fields.description: Array of day-of-week enum values applicable for this role

fields.name: timeWindowStart
fields.description: Typical start time, e.g., '08:00'

fields.name: timeWindowEnd
fields.description: Typical end time, e.g., '10:00'

fields.name: hoursPerWeek
fields.description: Estimated weekly time commitment

fields.name: ministryId
fields.description: Optional reference to Ministry

entities.name: VolunteerInterest
entities.description: Interest submission for a specific volunteer role.

fields.name: preferredTimeWindowStart
fields.description: Preferred start time, e.g., '08:00'

fields.name: preferredTimeWindowEnd
fields.description: Preferred end time, e.g., '10:00'

entities.name: Fund
entities.description: A giving destination/fund such as 'Youth Ministry'.

fields.name: fundCode
fields.description: Internal or external code for the fund

fields.name: ministryId
fields.description: Optional reference to Ministry supported by this fund

fields.name: isVisibleOnline
fields.description: If true, fund appears in online giving dropdowns

entities.name: Pledge
entities.description: A pledge/commitment record for giving to a specific fund.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Pledged amount in dollars

entities.name: Ministry
entities.description: A major church ministry (Youth, Children, Small Groups, Outreach, etc.).

fields.name: relatedFundId
fields.description: Optional default Fund for giving to this ministry

entities.name: Pastor
entities.description: A pastor or counselor with profile and counseling specialties.

fields.name: fullName
fields.description: Display name

fields.name: specialties
fields.description: Array of counseling specialty enum values

fields.name: isCounselor
fields.description: True if available for counseling appointments

entities.name: CounselingAvailabilitySlot
entities.description: An available counseling time slot for a specific pastor.

fields.name: isBooked
fields.description: True if this slot has already been reserved

entities.name: CounselingAppointmentRequest
entities.description: A request for a counseling appointment with a specific pastor and time slot.

fields.name: availabilitySlotId
fields.description: Selected CounselingAvailabilitySlot.id
